title: After purchasing crypto via Auto-Invest, where will the funds be stored? Add right

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
After purchasing crypto via Auto-Invest, where will the funds be stored? Add right

Funds will be subscribed to Simple Earn Flexible Product
Funds will be added to the users' Spot Wallet
Funds will be subscribed to users' Funding Wallet

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Funds will be added to the users' Spot Wallet.
